# Implement feature request

Implement this feature: **[FEATURE_DESCRIPTION]**

## Required output

1. Brief implementation plan (3-6 steps).
2. Code changes completed in relevant files.
3. Tests added/updated for new behavior and key edge cases.
4. Short handoff note with:
   - Behavior implemented
   - Files changed
   - Known limitations (if any)

## Constraints

- Favor straightforward design over over-engineering.
- Reuse existing helpers and conventions.
- Preserve backward compatibility unless explicitly requested.
